name: Ski Drive: Biathlon
short_description: Incredible snowmobile rides in snow capped hills - what could be better? The biathlon snowmobile championship, of course! Here you have to take part in an exciting snowmobile race and test your accuracy by shooting a rifle.
detailed_description:
Incredible snowmobile rides in snow capped hills - what could be better? The biathlon snowmobile championship, of course!
Here you have to take part in an exciting snowmobile race and test your accuracy by shooting a rifle.



Just imagine: you are riding a powerful snowmobile through the snowy trails, surrounded by amazing winter landscapes, whirling up snow and leaving your problems behind. In the firing line where you have to shoot targets. You shoot and hit the target and rush towards victory. That’s a real surge of emotion!

Ski Drive: Biathlon features:

  • Rifle shooting;
  • Amazing winter landscapes.

It’s a perfect game for gun shooting and snowmobile riding lovers!
